body_txt: A person's body is taken over by some foreign intelligence. It's not brainwashing , because they still have control of their own mind — but that's all they have. Either they've been reduced to a spectator in their own body, or their soul has been booted out of their body entirely. Either way, the rest of the cast will soon find he's Not Himself . For information on specific types of hosts, look to Body and Host . Not to be confused with the people who steal corpses , the Deathcore band of the same name, or the titular antagonists of the Invasion of the Body Snatchers series whose plans are closer to Kill and Replace .
